  engine_id: "copilot",

    firewall: "squid"
  },
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
};

// Write to /tmp/gh-aw directory to avoid inclusion in PR
const tmpPath = '/tmp/gh-aw/aw_info.json';
fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));
console.log('Generated aw_info.json at:', tmpPath);
console.log(JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));

// Set model as output for reuse in other steps/jobs
core.setOutput('model', awInfo.model);

2026-02-27T12:34:28.9797718Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9797973Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798116Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798320Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:28.9798655Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
